# Operator Profile

## General Information
- Operator Name: Test Tender Operator One
- Company Type: tender-operator
- Industry: Industrial equipment procurement
- Regions: Russian Federation (all regions)
- Company Size: 25 employees

## Working Categories
- Industrial control equipment
- Electrical distribution equipment
- Automation systems

## Excluded Categories
- Medical equipment
- Pharmaceutical products

## Target NMCK Range
- Minimum: 1,000,000 RUB
- Maximum: 50,000,000 RUB

## VAT Mode
- [x] Works with VAT
- [ ] Works without VAT

## Financial Constraints
- Target margin: 15%
- Acceptable payment delay: 45 days
- Acceptable contract security: 30%
- Maximum cash gap: 5,000,000 RUB

## Licensing
- SRO approvals in construction/installation
- No specific product licenses required
